title: Madagascar's Ancient Baobabs Store 700 Years Of Climate Secrets What They Reveal
description: (MENAFN - The Conversation) Madagascar is home to seven species of baobab trees, of which six are found nowhere else on the planet. Many of the trees have been alive for well over 1,000 years. The ...

title: Panlong Ancient Road: Strasse mit über 600 Kurven in China
description: Die Panlong Ancient Road ist nichts für schwache Nerven. Mit über 600 Haarnadelkurven schlängelt sie sich durch das chinesische Hochland. Die Strasse befindet sich in der Nähe von Taxkorgan im Autonomen Uigurischen Gebiet Xinjiang.

title: Uncovering Odisha’s secrets: An ancient settlement beneath Puri, shrines and a sacred hilltop
description: With districts such as Balangir now free from the Naxal menace, revelation of more such Odiya secrets is awaited with bated breath

title: The race against time to save Xochimilco, Mexico City’s ancient wetland
description: Initiatives from human hair filters to micro-nano-bubble injections are being deployed to restore the canals that sustain the threatened axolotl

title: Green Party pushing to reduce dependence on fossil fuels
description: The party says it will make New Zealand a more resilient economy.
